endpoint.description: S3 endpoint URL (null = AWS default for the region; set for MinIO / Ceph RGW / other S3-compatible stores)

accessKeyId.description: Access key id (null = AWS default credential chain / IAM role)

secretAccessKey.description: Secret access key (null = AWS default credential chain / IAM role)

forcePathStyle.description: Path-style bucket addressing (required by MinIO and most self-hosted stores)

keyPrefix.description: Optional key prefix inside the bucket (e.g. 'attachments/')
